title: brackit 3 Rolls Double-Sided White Foam Craft Tape – 25mm x 1mm x 10m – Multipurpose For Crafting, Card Making, Arts & Crafts, Wrapping, Securing Photographs, Documents, And More
features: GREAT VALUE: Each roll of tape measures 25mm wide by 10m in length and is 1mm thick. Each pack contains 3 large rolls of tape meaning you get a total of 30 metres of 1mm thick foam tape.

VERSATILE: Our double-sided foam tape can be used for a huge range of applications but it is mainly suitable for arts and craft projects such as card making, scrapbooking, decoupage or creating gift boxes through to mounting pictures or securing photographs into albums.
REMOVABLE : Brackit’s padded tape can easily be torn by hand, is easy to apply and can be removed from hard surfaces without leaving any glue residue.
HIGH QUALITY: Our foam craft tape has strong adhesion and is uv resistant, waterproof and heat resistant and with super sticky adhesive you can rely on it to last for years to come.
SAFE: Our self-adhesive craft tape does not contain acid or harsh chemicals and is safe for kids to use and is an ideal addition to any classroom art supplies set.
